case_title: HERMAN RODRIGUEZ VS. KUNG WU COMPANY

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-14-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT KUNG WU COMPANY
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-06-2018 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RODRIGUEZ, HERMAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KUNG WU COMPANY $1,050.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,115.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF RODRIGUEZ, HERMAN AS TO DEFENDANT KUNG WU COMPANY
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY RODRIGUEZ, HERMAN AS TO DEFENDANT KUNG WU COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-06-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT KUNG WU COMPANY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-06-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-06-2018 BY PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF. PLAINTIFF HERMAN RODRIGUEZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT KUNG WU COMPANY IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY WALTER TOM, MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)
